title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: // It's the day of the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
/* Parcae's calculations have yet to reach zero.
The 991031021222 integer remains.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Trainer continues to appeal to my emotions,
urging me to "let my tenacity carry me through."
Whatever that means.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
There's been no change to my fate, according to
Parcae. However, I won't know the full results
until I put the numbers to the test for real. */
